title: Deeplinks
text:
<custom data-type="mention" data-id="id-0">@Aviram Mekaitten</custom> The following links should be used when sending notifications or in the chat.

These should be supported by the mobile application.

\*\*When no portfolio is found (if an error accrues) - we will redirect the user to the dashboard page 

| **Module** | **Destination** | **Path** | **Example** | **DeepLink style** | **Supported Platform** | **Since Version** | **Comments** | **Id (for Automation use - do Not change)** | **2025 Relevance**  | **automation coverage**  |  |
